Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Decals / Decals

Decals

Overview

As of May 29th 2026, there are 746 Decals[1] In-Game

Decals are Cosmetic Items introduced in Chapter 5: Season 1. They can be used in Battle Royale and Rocket Racing.
